---
title: Theme Array Test
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - vapor
      - custom.scss
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["#170229", "smoke-test-custom-rule", "#abc123"]
---

## Theme Array

This tests that a theme array with a built-in theme (vapor) plus a
custom SCSS file produces CSS containing both the built-in theme
variables and the custom rule.
